top_stories.title: Quantifying the Necessity of Chain of Thought through Opaque Serial Depth
top_stories.summary: arXiv:2603.09786v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) tend to externalize their reasoning in their chain of thought, making the chain of thought a good target for monitoring. top_stories.title: Amazon gets court order blocking Perplexity's AI shopping agent
top_stories.summary: Amazon stops Perplexity's shopping bot by court order: a ruling that could shape the future of AI agents in e-commerce. The article Amazon gets court order blocking Perplexity's AI shopping agent appeared first on The Decoder.

top_stories.title: ChatGPT now explains math and physics with interactive visualizations
top_stories.summary: ChatGPT now displays interactive visualizations for math and physics topics where users can tweak variables and watch graphs update in real time. More than 70 concepts are available at launch. The article ChatGPT now explains math and physics with interactive visualizations appeared first on The Decoder.

top_stories.title: How physical AI integration accelerates vehicle innovation
top_stories.summary: The integration of physical AI into vehicles remains a primary objective for automakers looking to accelerate innovation. top_stories.technical_takeaway: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.
